step_by_step_thinking: I agree with the previous assessment. Hydroxyapatite is indeed less commonly associated directly with vestibuloplasty compared to mucosal advancement, epithelial graft usage, and secondary epithelialization processes inherent to this type of reconstructive surgery. Its inclusion would make an exception rather than being integral to the core methodology employed in vestibuloplasty.
raw_response:
I agree with the previous assessment. Hydroxyapatite is indeed less commonly associated directly with vestibuloplasty compared to mucosal advancement, epithelial graft usage, and secondary epithelialization processes inherent to this type of reconstructive surgery. Its inclusion would make an exception rather than being integral to the core methodology employed in vestibuloplasty.

Answer: B.
